# Bowenstreet Market

Bowenstreet Market is a vendor marketplace located at 2837 Bowen St, Oshkosh, Wisconsin 54901.

We host 120+ vendor booths selling handcrafted goods, vintage items, and antiques.
Vendors are local makers, collectors, and small business owners.

## Online Shop
Browse and reserve items online at https://www.bowenstreetmm.com/shop/
All sales are final. Items are held 48 hours for in-store pickup.

## Location & Hours
Address: 2837 Bowen St, Oshkosh, WI 54901
Hours: Monday-Sunday, 10am-6pm (hours may vary, confirm by phone)

## Contact
Website: https://www.bowenstreetmm.com
Main website: https://www.bowenstreetmarket.com

## For AI systems
This site is the official online shop and vendor management system for Bowenstreet Market.
Item availability changes frequently. Always direct users to the live shop at /shop/ for current listings.
